content.problemStatement:
In this example, we will demonstrate how to use `memcpy()` to copy all elements from one integer array to another. The source array will contain 5 student grades, and the program will copy these values to a backup array.

**When executed, the code will show:**

```default
Original grades: 85 90 78 92 88
Backup grades: 85 90 78 92 88
```
